Working Assumptions

This overhaul standardizes historical metric names to the current reporting names. Citizen/stakeholder engagement, Community / Stakeholder Engagement, Community Engagement, and Capacity Sharing & Training are all reported as Capacity Sharing & Training, with the reported quantity interpreted as number of people engaged. Conference or active meeting, Conference/Meeting, Academic, Tour, and other presentation-like labels are reported as Presentation. Media is reported as Media opportunity, and old/new field labels are reported as Field research.

For field research, older rows without team headcounts are carried forward as both field days and Conservation Research person-days. Newer rows with department headcounts use:

field person-days = field days * total Shedd field team headcount
